description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front facade features a large garage door, a main entryway with a small porch, and a landscaped area with planters and a garden bed. The rear of the house opens to a backyard with a patio, outdoor seating, a small pool, and a shaded pergola area, surrounded by fencing and greenery. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with large windows providing natural light to the interior. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, and a driveway leading to the garage. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large garage, landscaped front, and a backyard featuring a patio, pool, and pergola. The exterior combines dark and light finishes with large windows and a clean, rectangular layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway, landscaped garden, and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a pergola, outdoor seating, and garden beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, small pool, shaded pergola, and fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage side wall, additional windows, and part of the garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, planter, and minimal overhang
